message:
fix: fail nightly health check when expectCards dashboard renders zero cards (#3592)

Previously zero cards only set status to 'warn' and had no assertion,
so a completely broken dashboard would pass CI. Now sets status to 'fail'
and adds an expect() assertion.

Fixes #3562

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
